_desc: MESHROUTE port of s06_seattle_bcn_lifecycle_mid — the suite's DISAPPEARING-NODE / churn coverage. 33 nodes single-layer (explicit topology links). 25 boot over 45s, 8 join from 15m, 5 die from 35m (dies_at_ms). Purpose: measure seen_bitmap's BENEFIT (keeping routes-via-departed-relays fresh) vs its beacon-capacity cost. Seattle lifecycle cold-start baseline generated from s03. No warmup/hot-start. 2
